originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Reportedly Stiffens Iran Deal Terms; Nvidia, Tesla Lead 5 Titans Near Buy Points
summary: The stock market hit fresh highs on Iran deal hopes. Nvidia, Tesla lead five trillion-dollar titans near buy points.
content: The stock market hit fresh highs on Iran deal hopes. Nvidia, Tesla lead five trillion-dollar titans near buy points.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：据报道特朗普加强了伊朗协议条款；英伟达、特斯拉领衔 5 家巨头接近买入点
chineseSummary: 由于伊朗协议的希望，股市创下新高。英伟达（Nvidia）、特斯拉（Tesla）领先五家价值万亿美元的巨头，接近买入点。
chineseContent: 由于伊朗协议的希望，股市创下新高。英伟达（Nvidia）、特斯拉（Tesla）领先五家价值万亿美元的巨头，接近买入点。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
